description: A league is expanding and adding a new team. An administrator must manage the expansion draft.

nodes.task_description: Request all existing teams to submit their list of 'protected' players who are ineligible for the expansion draft.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the protected lists from all teams.

nodes.task_description: Compile a list of all available, unprotected players for the new team to choose from.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the official list of players available in the expansion draft.

nodes.task_description: Facilitate the expansion draft, allowing the new team to select players from the list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the new team's selections in real time.
